name: weather
description: Weather block class — a $block subclass that displays current conditions, a forecast, and recent history for a configured place. Owner sets `place`, `units`, and `forecast_hours`; an external plug Worker (catalogs/weather/plug) fetches tomorrow.io on a schedule and pushes data via apikey-bound session.

classes.description: A weather display block. The owner configures `place` (a location string the upstream API understands, e.g. "Mountain View, CA"), `units` ("metric" or "imperial"), and `forecast_hours` (how many hours of forecast to surface). The plug pushes `current` as a scalar shape (headline temperature), `forecast` as a table (hourly), and `history` as a series. `last_pushed_at` and `last_error` ride the standard $block writable_self surface so :look surfaces freshness.

Metadata holder for the weather catalog: keeps the default summary_props list separate from the live class so plug installers and UI introspection can read it without colliding with subclass overrides.
